quote: Even when a friend does something you do not like, he continues to be your friend.  – Genghis Khan
fact: Facetious and abstemious contain all the vowels in the correct order, as does arsenious, meaning "containing arsenic."
joke: Why do scuba divers fall backwards into the water? Because if they fell forwards they’d still be in the boat.
